what: Read .claude/settings.json and .claude/settings.local.json, extract and merge hooks field
why: Users need to see all hooks (shared + local) in one view

success_handling.criteria: Settings files read and hooks extracted

error_handling.action: Return error with code INVALID_JSON and file path

error_handling.scenario: No hooks key in either file

decisions.reason: Show both shared and local hooks, labeled by source file
decisions.rationale: Users need to distinguish between committed hooks and personal overrides

decisions.reason: Return raw JSON of the hooks section
decisions.rationale: Editor will show the full JSON for each settings file

decisions.reason: Parse settings files with try/catch for graceful degradation
decisions.rationale: One broken file shouldn't prevent showing the other
